prompt: Create a photorealistic horizontal luxury lifestyle photo of a young East Asian woman standing on the open deck of a white yacht at sea during golden hour. She has long dark windblown hair, a soft confident smile, delicate earrings, and sunglasses resting on top of her head. She wears a silky satin champagne bronze halter-neck wrap dress with a deep V neckline, fitted waist, draped fabric, and a thigh-high slit revealing one leg, plus elegant sandals. Pose her leaning casually against the curved yacht railing with one hand resting on the polished wooden handrail, body turned slightly to the side, looking off to her left rather than at the camera. The yacht deck has teak flooring, a curved white fiberglass wall, chrome railing posts, and a polished brown wooden rail sweeping diagonally through the composition. The background is an expansive blue ocean with a flat distant horizon and soft shallow depth of field, no land visible. Use warm low-angle sunlight from the side, natural skin tones, crisp high-end fashion photography, realistic lens compression, 16:9 composition, subject slightly left of center, ocean filling most of the upper background. Avoid text, logos, watermarks, extra people, distorted hands, or artificial-looking skin.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic horizontal luxury lifestyle photo of a young East Asian woman standing on the open deck of a white yacht at sea during golden hour. She has long dark windblown hair, a soft confident smile, delicate earrings, and sunglasses resting on top of her head. She wears a silky satin champagne bronze halter-neck wrap dress with a deep V neckline, fitted waist, draped fabric, and a thigh-high slit revealing one leg, plus elegant sandals. Pose her leaning casually against the curved yacht railing with one hand resting on the polished wooden handrail, body turned slightly to the side, looking off to her left rather than at the camera. The yacht deck has teak flooring, a curved white fiberglass wall, chrome railing posts, and a polished brown wooden rail sweeping diagonally through the composition. The background is an expansive blue ocean with a flat distant horizon and soft shallow depth of field, no land visible. Use warm low-angle sunlight from the side, natural skin tones, crisp high-end fashion photography, realistic lens compression, 16:9 composition, subject slightly left of center, ocean filling most of the upper background. Avoid text, logos, watermarks, extra people, distorted hands, or artificial-looking skin.
promptZh: 创作一张写实风格的横版豪华生活方式照片，画面中一位年轻的 东亚裔 女性站在海上白色游艇的露天甲板上，时间为黄金时刻。她留着深色长发，在风中微微飘动，面带自信柔和的微笑，佩戴精致的耳环，头顶架着一副太阳镜。她身穿一件丝滑缎面 香槟古铜色 挂脖式裹身裙，深 V 领口，收腰剪裁，面料垂坠，高开叉设计露出一侧腿部，并搭配优雅的凉鞋。让她随意地倚靠在游艇的弧形栏杆上，一只手搭在抛光的木质扶手上，身体微微侧转，视线看向左侧，而非直视镜头。游艇甲板铺设柚木地板，背景有弧形白色玻璃纤维墙、镀铬栏杆立柱，以及一条斜向穿过构图的抛光棕色木质扶手。背景是广阔的蓝色海洋，远处地平线平坦，采用柔和的浅景深效果，画面中不可见陆地。使用来自侧面的温暖低角度阳光，呈现自然的肤色，展现高端时尚摄影的质感，运用真实的镜头压缩效果，采用 16:9 构图，主体位于画面中心偏左位置，海洋占据大部分背景上方空间。避免出现文字、Logo、水印、多余人物、手部畸形或皮肤质感不自然的情况。
